title: How to Choose the Right Commercial Gelato Machine for Your Business
author: BEJADY Team
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to choosing the right commercial gelato machine: cylinder count, capacity, compressor types, and budget considerations for your business.

children.text: Why Choosing the Right Gelato Machine Matters

Starting a gelato business or upgrading your equipment? The machine you choose directly impacts your product quality, production capacity, and operating costs. With 20 years of manufacturing experience, BEJADY has helped thousands of businesses find their perfect machine.
Step 1: Determine Your Production Volume
The first question to answer is: how much gelato do you need to produce daily?
Low volume (10-20 L/day): Single or double cylinder machine — perfect for cafes and startups
Medium volume (20-40 L/day): Triple cylinder machine — ideal for dedicated gelato shops
High volume (40-80 L/day): Four or six cylinder machine — for busy stores and chains
Step 2: Consider Your Flavor Variety

Each cylinder produces one flavor at a time. A 3-cylinder machine lets you offer 3 flavors simultaneously while a third is in production. Most successful gelato shops run 8-12 flavors — so production planning matters.
Step 3: Compressor Quality

The compressor is the heart of your gelato machine. BEJADY partners with Copeland, Bitzer, and Panasonic — world-leading brands that ensure consistent cooling and energy efficiency. A quality compressor means lower electricity bills and fewer breakdowns.
Step 4: Certifications and Compliance

If you're exporting or opening in a regulated market, certifications matter. BEJADY machines are CE certified for Europe, with UL options for North America. All food-contact materials are FDA-compliant.
Quick Comparison Table
Model | Capacity | Power | Best For
Single Cylinder | 10-14 L/h | 1.5 kW | Cafes, startups
Double Cylinder | 20-28 L/h | 2.8 kW | Restaurants, small shops
Triple Cylinder | 30-40 L/h | 4.2 kW | Gelato parlors
Four Cylinder | 40-55 L/h | 5.6 kW | High-volume stores
Six Cylinder | 60-80 L/h | 8.4 kW | Industrial production
Need Help Deciding?
Every business is different. Contact BEJADY's sales team for a personalized recommendation based on your specific needs, market, and budget.
